## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New calculator / method / feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck` passes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (calculators pinned to a cited reference value)
- [ ] If a tool changed, I ran `pnpm -C packages/core gen:tools` (didn't hand-edit the README table)
- [ ] I considered semver impact (changing a calculator's output is a breaking change)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
